mapper.select: SELECT count(stb_id) acc_dvc_qty FROM dm_acc_dvc_mst dadm WHERE (dadm.acc_modl_id, dadm.acc_sw_ver) = ( SELECT acc_modl_id, acc_sw_ver FROM UM_UPD_ACC_DISTB_MST WHERE acc_distb_id = #{accDistbId})

SELECT uuadm.acc_distb_id, count(dadm.stb_id) acc_dvc_qty FROM um_upd_acc_distb_mst uuadm, dm_acc_dvc_mst dadm WHERE uuadm.acc_modl_id = dadm.acc_modl_id(+) AND uuadm.acc_sw_ver = dadm.acc_sw_ver(+) AND uuadm.acc_modl_id = #{accModlId} GROUP BY uuadm.acc_distb_id

SELECT DDM.STB_ID , DECODE(LENGTH(STB.USER_SERVICE_NUM), 10, '상용', '테스트용' ) STBDIVISION , PS.MAC_ADDRESS , ( SELECT SM.MODEL_NAME FROM STB_MODEL SM WHERE SM.MODEL_CODE = PS.MODEL_CODE ) MODEL_NAME , ( SELECT MCM.CUG_NM FROM DM_CUG_MST DCM , MN_CUG_MST MCM WHERE To_char(stb.service_code) = DCM.CUG_ID AND DCM.CUG_ID = MCM.CUG_ID AND ROWNUM = 1) CUG_EXPL , ( SELECT COMM.CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD COMM WHERE COMM.COMM_GRP_CD = 'IPTV_STATUS_CODE' AND COMM.COMM_CD = STB.IPTV_STATUS_CODE ) CD_NM , DDM.CLNT_IPADDR , DDM.RCU_MANUFR_CD , DDM.RCU_FIRM_VER , DDM.CLNT_PUB_IPADDR , DDM.STB_SW_VER STB_SW_PLAN_INST_VER , DDM.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER , UUPM.PLAN_NM , TO_CHAR(DDM.STB_LAST_CONN_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') STB_LAST_CONN_DATE , TO_CHAR(DDM.STM_UPTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') STM_UPTM , DECODE(DDM.STM_UPTM, NULL, '', TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC(DDM.STM_UPTM)|| '일') AS OVERUPTIME , 'N' AS MYSTBYN , ( SELECT DQTM.TEAM_NM FROM DM_QLTY_TEAM_MST DQTM WHERE DDM.TEAM_CD = DQTM.TEAM_CD AND ROWNUM = 1) AREAQLTY , STB.USER_SERVICE_NUM , DECODE(DDM.HDMI_POW, '1', '사용함', '0', '사용 안함', NULL) HDMI_POW , DECODE(DDM.RCU_PAIRING, '1', 'Y', '0', 'N', NULL) RCU_PAIRING , DDM.TEAM_CD , TO_CHAR(DDM.STB_SW_UPD_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') STB_SW_UPD_DATE , DDM.LOCK_YN , DDM.UPD_YN , DDM.native_ui_ver ,
errTbl.* ,
DDM.web_ui_ver , DADM.acc_sw_ver FROM STB STB , DM_DVC_MST DDM , PHYSICAL_STB PS , UM_UPD_PLAN_MST UUPM , DM_ACC_DVC_MST DADM
, (SELECT (SELECT CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD cd WHERE cd.COMM_CD = '02' AND COMM_GRP_CD = 'DVC_FG_CD') DVC_FG_NM , al.ACC_DISTB_ID PLAN_ID , al.ACC_TRANS_ID EXE_SCH_ID , al.ACC_DISTB_ID PLAN_NM , nvl(err.PRG_STS_FG_CD, ' ') prg_sts_fg_cd , g.stb_id , nvl((SELECT CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD cd WHERE cd.COMM_CD = err.PRG_STS_FG_CD AND COMM_GRP_CD = 'PRG_STS_FG_CD'), ' ') PRG_STS_FG_NM FROM UM_UPD_ACC_DISTB_MST m, UM_UPD_ACC_DISTB_STS_HST al, UM_ERR_CD_MST err , ( SELECT ACC_DISTB_ID, STB_ID, MIN(stm_fir_reg_date) MIN_DATE, MAX(stm_fir_reg_date) MAX_DATE FROM UM_UPD_ACC_DISTB_STS_HST WHERE 1=1 AND ACC_DISTB_ID=#{accDistbId} GROUP BY ACC_DISTB_ID, STB_ID ) g WHERE 1=1 AND g.ACC_DISTB_ID = al.ACC_DISTB_ID AND g.MAX_DATE = al.STM_FIR_REG_DATE AND g.STB_ID = al.STB_ID AND al.ACC_DISTB_ID = m.ACC_DISTB_ID AND al.ERR_CD = err.ERR_CD) errTbl
WHERE 1 = 1 AND DDM.STB_ID = STB.STB_ID AND DDM.STB_ID = PS.STB_ID (+) AND DDM.PLAN_ID = UUPM.PLAN_ID (+) AND DDM.STB_ID = DADM.STB_ID (+)
AND DDM.STB_ID = errTbl.stb_id (+) AND DDM.STB_ID IN ( SELECT ddgpm.stb_id FROM DM_DVC_GRP_PSNL_MAP ddgpm, UM_UPD_ACC_DISTB_DVC_GRP_MAP uuaddgm WHERE ddgpm.dvc_grp_id = uuaddgm.DVC_GRP_ID AND uuaddgm.acc_distb_id = #{accDistbId})
AND ${searchType} IN
UPPER(#{type})
LOWER(#{type})
ORDER BY DDM.STB_ID
